overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a futuristic city street during golden hour. The character passes neon-lit commercial buildings, construction barriers, and digital billboards before sitting on a concrete bench. The scene features heavy cyberpunk aesthetic with mixed modern glass and traditional Japanese architecture, moderate vehicle traffic, and warm sunset lighting contrasting with artificial neon signage.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past the Wash & Run shop, maintaining a consistent pace

tall orange-red barrier wall running parallel to the sidewalk
tall curved street lamp with blue metallic finish
multi-level highway and pedestrian overpass structure spanning the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cyberpunk commercial street during golden hour. The camera follows the character past the 'Wash & Run' facility on the left, with a red construction barrier running alongside the sidewalk. Futuristic vehicles drive by on the multi-lane road to the right, while an elevated highway structure looms in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: construction wall with large advertising billboards

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk beside the long red construction wall, passing large digital billboards

notable_agents.action: security guard in dark uniform and cap walking past the camera from right to left in the foreground

entered.detail: massive red digital billboard displaying 'ZERO BODY' text with an image of a figure

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a continuous red construction wall covered with large digital billboards, including one prominently displaying 'ZERO BODY' in red. The elevated highway structure draws closer ahead. A security guard passes by in the foreground, and the Wash & Run shop disappears behind as the camera moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: mixed traditional-modern building with outdoor seating area

events.description: character approaches a concrete bench and sits down, ending the forward movement

agents.ego_description: walking up to a traditional-style building and sitting down on a concrete bench against the wall

entered.detail: two-story building combining traditional Japanese wooden architecture with modern elements and green neon trim
large digital screen showing a woman's face with dramatic blue eye makeup and the text 'LICK SIZE'
simple concrete bench positioned against the building wall where the character sits

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions from the construction wall to a traditional-meets-modern building with a large billboard featuring a woman's face. The character approaches a concrete bench positioned against the building wall and sits down, concluding the walk. The elevated highway is now much closer overhead, and the lighting shifts to a mix of warm sunset and building shadows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a futuristic commercial street that transitions from an open roadside into a shadowed urban nook. It begins by following the character past a Wash & Run facility and a red construction barrier, with futuristic vehicles streaming by on a multi-lane road beneath a distant elevated highway. As the camera moves forward, the view shifts to a long stretch of construction wall dominated by glowing digital billboards, including a prominent red Zero Body sign, while a security guard crosses the foreground. The scene then opens up toward a building blending traditional and modern architecture featuring a large billboard of a woman's face, as the overhead highway structure looms closer. Finally, the lighting shifts from the warm glow of golden hour into deep building shadows as the character approaches and sits on a concrete bench.
